> **FICTIONAL DOCUMENT: Meridian John Doe Financial is a synthetic company. All content is fabricated for demonstration. See NOTICE.md.**

# 1 Synthetic Onboarding Procedure

## 1.1 Purpose

This synthetic procedure exists only for ingestion tests. It describes a made up
onboarding flow for a fictional account. The customer SSN 123-45-6789 must be
captured and redacted before any embedding occurs.

## 1.2 Steps Table

The dual-approval matrix below is a small table that must never be split across
chunks.

| Step | Owner | Threshold |
|---|---|---|
| Identity check | OPERATIONS_ANALYST | mandatory |
| Approval | BRANCH_STAFF | over 10000 |
